chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Suit No. 276 of 2017 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1.For hearing of CMA No.1481/17 2.For hearing of CMA No.4512/17 3.For hearing of CMA No.4864/17 4.For final disposal 20.04.2023 Mr.Muhammad Ali Lakhani, advocate for the plaintiff Mr.Nusrat Ali, advocate for defendant ---------- Counsel for the Plaintiff submits that he has received instructions from his client to withdraw this suit. Counsel for the defendant has no objection. Accordingly, this suit is dismissed as withdrawn along with listed applications. J U D G E Ashraf
